mapper.select: SELECT tablename AS tableNm, SPLIT_PART(tablename, '_', 5) as yyyy FROM pg_catalog.pg_tables WHERE SCHEMANAME = 'log' AND TABLENAME LIKE 'tb_ip_hist_mst_%' AND SPLIT_PART(tablename, '_', 5) <= to_char(now(), 'YYYY') ORDER BY SPLIT_PART(tablename, '_', 5) DESC

SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SIP_BLOCK , A.NBITMASK , A.SNETMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY , A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY , A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED , A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT , A.NUSE_IP_CNT , A.NFREE_IP_CNT , A.NCLASS_CNT , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , A.NPRIORITY , J.NLVL_MST_SEQ , J.SCOMMENT , (SELECT SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST WHERE A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = NIPMS_SVC_SEQ LIMIT 1) AS SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B ON B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST C ON C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F ON F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G ON G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H ON H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I ON I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD INNER JOIN MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST J ON J.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ WHERE J.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = #{nipBlockMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NBITMASK , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , H.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , CASE WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 9 THEN 'DHCP 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 10 THEN 'CONFIG 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME -- 수용국 , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS -- 장비명 , A.SMODELNAME -- 모델명 , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION -- I/F명 , A.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , I.SSVC_MGROUP_NM -- 서비스대분류 , J.SSVC_LGROUP_NM -- 상품명 , K.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , L.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SLLNUM , A.SSAID , A.SCUSTNAME , A.SCOMMENT FROM LOG.${tableNm} A LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST B ON B.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD C ON C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD D ON D.SLVL_CD = B.SSVC_GROUP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD E ON E.SLVL_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD F ON F.SLVL_CD = A.SOFFICECODE LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G ON G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD H ON H.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD I ON I.SSVC_MGROUP_CD = LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD, 6) LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD J ON J.SSVC_LGROUP_CD = RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD, 6) LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD K ON K.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD L ON L.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD WHERE A.NIP_HIST_MST_SEQ = #{nipHistMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
